violations.text: The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The coving under the 3-bay sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2025
The gasket located on the one door freezer was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the high temp dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The condensate from the stand up freezer in the storage room, has an accumulation of ice build up. The Freezer must be defrosted to eliminate the ice build up. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The coving below the three bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The tile floor was observed with cracks and chips. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
